ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sales channel (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region of sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Sale amount before discount and tax */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product sold */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total sale amount including discount and tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of sales channel (e.g., E-commerce, Retail) */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL of the sales channel (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product category */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product (if applicable) */,
  "product_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Fresh, Dairy, Grocery) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales associate, manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view sales data, edit sales data) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_amount" TEXT /* Forecasted sale amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory record */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
